---
title: "About"
lang: pt
image: image.jpg
language: 
    en:
      title-block-published: "About"
comments: false
about: 
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/public-profile/settings?trk=d_flagship3_profile_self_view_public_profile
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/GabrielPalucci
---

oiii
